summary: Completed testing of new /why-mobile educational sales page. All features implemented correctly and working as expected.
passed_tests: Hero section displays 'Why Mobile Matters' label and main heading with red 'Losing Customers' text
Problem section with 3 problem cards renders correctly (text too small, buttons too small, slow load)
Phone comparison section with before/after mockups displays correctly (bad-mobile and good-mobile)
Changes section with 6 cards (3 bad with X, 3 good with checkmarks) renders correctly
CTA section with both 'Get Your Free Audit' and 'View Pricing' buttons renders
Footer renders with copyright text '2026 Liminal Group LLC'
'Get Your Free Audit' button links correctly to homepage /#audit
'View Pricing' button links correctly to homepage /#pricing
Navigation from /why-mobile to homepage via CTA buttons works correctly
Homepage (/) still works correctly with all sections intact
Demo pages still work: /demos/restaurant, /demos/roofing return HTTP 200
All data-testid attributes present: wm-hero-section, wm-stats-section, wm-problem-section, wm-comparison-section, wm-changes-section, wm-cta-section, wm-footer
context_for_next_testing_agent: New /why-mobile page created and fully tested. All sections render correctly, all CTA links navigate properly to homepage /#audit and /#pricing. Page includes phone mockups showing before/after comparison of mobile optimization. All data-testid attributes are in place for future testing.
